summary: A clip filmed in the Oval Office showing a man with light hair in a dark suit and pink tie speaking from behind a lectern bearing the presidential seal. Flags and military service flags stand to his left and a large framed portrait hangs on the patterned wall behind him. A wider sampled frame shows another man in a dark suit standing to the side observing.

script.scene: A man in a dark suit and pink tie speaks at a lectern with the presidential seal; flags and a framed portrait behind him.
Wider framing shows another man in a suit standing to the side as the speaker continues.
